mapper.sql: select r.id, r.notice_id, r.user_id, u.user_name, r.read_time, r.confirmed, r.tenant_id from oa_notice_read r left join sys_user u on u.user_id = r.user_id
mapper.insert: insert into oa_notice_read (notice_id, user_id, read_time, confirmed, tenant_id) values (#{noticeId}, #{userId}, #{readTime}, #{confirmed}, #{tenantId})
mapper.update: insert into oa_notice_read (notice_id, user_id, read_time, confirmed) values (#{noticeId}, #{userId}, #{readTime}, 1) on duplicate key update read_time = #{readTime}, confirmed = 1
mapper.select: where r.notice_id = #{noticeId} order by r.read_time desc

select u.user_id as user_id, u.user_name as user_name from sys_user u where u.status = '0' and u.del_flag = '0' and not exists ( select 1 from oa_notice_read r where r.notice_id = #{noticeId} and r.user_id = u.user_id )
select count(*) from oa_notice_read where notice_id = #{noticeId}
mapper.delete:
delete from oa_notice_read where notice_id in
#{noticeId}
